[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001010 3
1 1110001 4
2 1011101 5
3 1011111 6
4 0010010 2
5 1010110 4
6 0110101 4
7 1011110 5

45 54 1011110 5 match 7
56 65 0111011 5
67 76 0010110 3
70 07 1011101 5 match 2
